meaning: adv.同盟地,联邦地,联邦政府地,在联邦政府一级
examples: The Snoqualmie tribe regained its status as a federally recognized tribe.
Of the 563 tribes federally recognised, over 200 operate casinos.
As a result, most of the 500 federally owned chimpanzees are idling in warehouses.
Concentric counters that it now is running a federally funded trial of 120 patients.
Despite the political challenges of reform, the governments responsible were consistently re-elected both federally and provincially.
